creator: tphilipp@potion-studios.com
text:
(In reply to Tassilo Philipp from comment #3)

Ah, sorry, forgot to mention: gawk does allow more than two arguments for those functions, so maybe the previous implementation followed that style. However, I don't see any explicit reference to gawk for those functions, the only mention about the bitwise functions refers to OpenBSD, as mentioned above.
